name: Texture
summary: The Texture class contains methods for obtaining information about textures that are part of your materials in your model (within the In-Model section of the Materials Browser). Remember, textures are repeatable images that “tile” when painted on a surface.

methods.name: average_color
methods.summary: The average_color method retrieves a color object with the average color found in the texture.
methods.remarks: The average_color method retrieves a color object with the average color found in the texture.

returns.doc: a color object (if successful), nil if unsuccessful.

methods.name: filename
methods.remarks: Note: Since SketchUp 2021.0 this method will append a file extension matching the image format if the file extension is missing from stored filepath. The #filename method retrieves the full path, if available, for a texture object. Textures for materials shipping with SketchUp might only have a filename, since the path would be invalid on the end user's machine. Textures dynamically created from ImageRep objects may have an empty path unless saved with ImageRep#save_file or until the texture is saved with #write. If you need only the filename of the texture use filename = File.basename(texture.filename).

returns.doc: a string representation of the path and filename used for the texture.

methods.name: height
methods.summary: The height method is used to get the height of a repeatable texture image, in inches.
methods.remarks: The height method is used to get the height of a repeatable texture image, in inches.

returns.doc: the height, in inches, of the texture pattern

methods.name: image_height
methods.summary: The image_height method retrieves the height of the repeatable texture image, in pixels.
methods.remarks: The image_height method retrieves the height of the repeatable texture image, in pixels.

returns.doc: the height, in pixels, of the texture pattern

methods.name: image_rep
methods.summary: The #image_rep method returns a copy of a ImageRep object representing the texture pixel data.
methods.remarks: The #image_rep method returns a copy of a ImageRep object representing the texture pixel data.

params.name: colorized
params.doc: Set to true to obtain the colorized version.

methods.name: image_width
methods.summary: The image_width method retrieves the width of the repeatable texture image, in pixels.
methods.remarks: The image_width method retrieves the width of the repeatable texture image, in pixels.

returns.doc: the width, in pixels, of the texture pattern

methods.name: valid?
methods.summary: The valid? method ensures that a texture is valid.
methods.remarks: The valid? method ensures that a texture is valid.

methods.name: width
methods.summary: The width method is used to get the width of a repeatable texture image, in inches.
methods.remarks: The width method is used to get the width of a repeatable texture image, in inches.

returns.doc: the width, in inches, of the texture pattern

methods.name: write
methods.summary: Writes the texture to file with option to preserve the color adjustments made by the material.
methods.remarks: Writes the texture to file with option to preserve the color adjustments made by the material.

params.name: path
params.doc: The file path to write the texture to.

params.name: colorize
params.doc: Boolean - Allows for the texture to be exported with the color adjustments.

properties.name: size
properties.summary: The size= method allows you to set the size of the repeatable texture image, in inches,
properties.remarks: The size= method allows you to set the size of the repeatable texture image, in inches,
